name: Agent-Guided Relational Concept Discovery: Toward Interpretable Surgical Margin Assessment

description: arXiv:2607.21437v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep learning models can effectively use Rapid Evaporative Ionization Mass Spectrometry (REIMS) data for surgical margin assessment. However, their clinical adoption remains challenging due to limited generalization to operating room conditions. This difficulty arises because models are typically trained on labeled spectra collected from resected...
author: Nooshin Maghsoodi, Amoon Jamzad, Robert Policelli, Mohammad Farahmand, Dilakshan Srikanthan, Martin Kaufmann, Kevin Y. M. Ren, Shaila Merchant, Sonal Varma, Ross Walker, Doug McKay, John Rudan, Gabor Fichtinger, Parvin Mousavi
